message: feat(server): load redis.conf aclfile at startup

files.patch:
@@ -46,6 +46,7 @@
 {"id":"frankenredis-43d","title":"Reconcile TTL parity docs with implemented expiry coverage","description":"FEATURE_PARITY.md still describes TTL/eviction as a scaffold centered on PTTL, but the codebase already implements EXPIRE/PEXPIRE/EXPIREAT/PEXPIREAT/PERSIST/TTL/PTTL, store-level lazy expiry, active-expire cycles, runtime fast/slow expire scheduling, and core_expiry conformance coverage. Update the parity row to reflect the implemented/tested baseline without overstating full parity.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"docs","created_at":"2026-03-26T21:24:25.893411142Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-26T21:25:19.271202158Z","closed_at":"2026-03-26T21:25:19.271025303Z","close_reason":"Reconciled stale TTL parity docs with implemented expiry coverage","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenredis-4agg","title":"Port one more missing Redis parity behavior from legacy oracle","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-16T23:12:12.159890315Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-16T23:21:30.650337874Z","closed_at":"2026-04-16T23:21:30.648341954Z","close_reason":"Aligned config rewrite conformance harness with upstream config-file preconditions","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenredis-4ai0","title":"Add conformance fixtures validating all stub remediations","description":"# Add conformance fixtures for all stub remediations

## What
After each stub is replaced with a real implementation, add conformance test cases that would have FAILED with the old stub but PASS with the new implementation. This proves the fix works end-to-end.

## Fixtures to add/update

### core_server.json (INFO section)
- INFO stats after SET/GET operations should show non-zero keyspace_hits/misses
- INFO stats after key expiry should show non-zero expired_keys
- INFO clients should show correct blocked_clients count

### core_server.json (LATENCY section)
- CONFIG SET latency-monitor-threshold 1 → run DEBUG SLEEP 0.01 → LATENCY LATEST should return samples
- LATENCY HISTORY command should return entries
- LATENCY RESET should clear and return count

### core_server.json (SLOWLOG via Lua)
- EVAL \"return redis.call('SLOWLOG','LEN')\" should return real count (not 0)

### core_server.json (DEBUG section)
- DEBUG OBJECT <key> should return encoding info string
- DEBUG SET-ACTIVE-EXPIRE 0 should return OK

### core_scripting.json (Lua CLIENT)
- redis.call(\"CLIENT\", \"ID\") should return integer > 0 (not always 1)

### core_copy.json or new fixture
- ACL SAVE + ACL LOAD round-trip test

### core_stream.json
- XADD + XDEL + XINFO STREAM should show correct max-deleted-entry-id

## Depends on
- All implementation beads (this is the verification layer)

## Files to modify
- crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/core_server.json
- crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/core_scripting.json
- crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/core_stream.json
- crates/fr-conformance/tests/smoke.rs (if new fixtures added)","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:21:08.752602017Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-04T01:16:39.064325316Z","closed_at":"2026-04-04T01:16:39.064068490Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenredis-4ai0","depends_on_id":"frankenredis-1qdg","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:21:35.095210715Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"frankenredis-4ai0","depends_on_id":"frankenredis-2auy","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:21:35.463212327Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"frankenredis-4ai0","depends_on_id":"frankenredis-7ews","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:21:34.724984593Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"frankenredis-4ai0","depends_on_id":"frankenredis-djx8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:21:35.338495229Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"frankenredis-4ai0","depends_on_id":"frankenredis-egag","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:21:35.218914344Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"frankenredis-4ai0","depends_on_id":"frankenredis-kzxw","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:21:34.847390346Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"frankenredis-4ai0","depends_on_id":"frankenredis-nwgw","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:21:34.969929100Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"frankenredis-4ai0","depends_on_id":"frankenredis-xvvu","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:21:34.600855870Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"frankenredis-4c3o","title":"Load redis.conf aclfile at startup","description":"Upstream parity gap: redis.conf aclfile should configure and load ACL rules during server startup. fr-runtime already supports aclfile plus ACL LOAD, but fr-server startup config ignores aclfile. Apply aclfile from --config, fail startup on invalid ACL files, and freeze behavior with TCP auth/ACL coverage.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-18T01:58:50.208454022Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-18T02:10:44.503355682Z","closed_at":"2026-04-18T02:10:44.501518805Z","close_reason":"Implemented redis.conf aclfile startup loading with TCP success and invalid-file fail-fast coverage","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenredis-4pz","title":"Fix ZINCRBY to allow infinite score results","description":"ZINCRBY incorrectly rejected increment operations that resulted in positive or negative infinity. Redis allows infinite scores in Sorted Sets. Fixed by removing the is_infinite() check while keeping the is_nan() rejection.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-03-22T02:35:50.737363354Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-22T02:36:00.968199727Z","closed_at":"2026-03-22T02:36:00.967390134Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenredis-4sax","title":"Add metamorphic tests for CLIENT TRACKING option order and prefix dedup","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-17T10:31:12.351126973Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-17T10:39:42.410578591Z","closed_at":"2026-04-17T10:39:42.408728355Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenredis-4yyg","title":"Freeze Redis config form-feed splitter boundaries","description":"Add sdssplitargs conformance coverage for form-feed handling: accepted as C isspace after closing quotes and while skipping blanks, but preserved inside bare tokens because Redis only breaks bare tokens on space, LF, CR, tab, or NUL.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-18T01:31:05.260202234Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-18T01:35:02.007106348Z","closed_at":"2026-04-18T01:35:02.005224468Z","close_reason":"Added form-feed splitter boundary conformance coverage","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
